## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.14.3

### Motion Notifications
- Defaults mobile recording notifications to the HD/direct X-Sense clip path when the camera history record provides one.
- Adds a notification recording quality option so users can choose HD or SD behavior from the integration options.
- Keeps SD playback capture available for users who select SD, or when no direct clip URL is available.

### Recording Cache
- Skips thumbnail downloads in the foreground motion-notification cache path so the video clip is prepared first.
- Reduces SD recording preparation to one copy/remux pass while keeping the no-transcode Pion capture path.
- Adds timing debug logs for motion recording cache work and Pion capture stages.

### Validation
- Adds coverage for HD direct clip selection, SD notification quality selection, recording option defaults, and the updated Pion capture path.
